reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the inventory and proof-routing behavior; do not treat this as proof that the binary enforces human workflow order or writes fixtures.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic claim-discovery packet behavior plus workflow guidance: the CLI either emits inventory-backed proof routing before fixture authoring or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in claim-discover CLI test and direct CLI smoke: claim discover emits a proof-plan packet with source inventory and human-auditable, deterministic, and cautilus-eval proof routes without invoking fixture writing.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing claim discovery output shape, proof routing heuristics, or fixture-authoring workflow guidance.
